definition: Equity market concentration in AI-adjacent names exceeds dot-com peak levels, with top 10 S&P 500 weight at ~35-38% vs 2000 peak of ~27% (30-40% higher). ~55% of US equity AUM in passive vehicles mechanically reinforces concentration. Momentum factor has 70%+ overlap with AI names. Equal-weighted S&P 500 has underperformed cap-weighted by 800-1200bp in 2024-2025.
evidence: Top 10 S&P 500 weight ~35-38% vs 2000 peak ~27% (30-40% higher than dot-com)
HHI of S&P 500 at ~250-280 vs historical norm 100-150
~55% of US equity AUM in passive vehicles mechanically reinforcing concentration
Momentum factor has 70%+ overlap with AI names
Equal-weighted S&P 500 underperformed cap-weighted by 800-1200bp in 2024-2025
Pair_0 confirmed this as a structural feature, not a forecast
open_questions: Does passive vehicle dominance make the unwinding mechanism different from 2000-2002?
What is the threshold at which concentration becomes self-correcting vs self-reinforcing?
Market concentration duration estimate: 7-12 years from onset, currently ~5 years in — how much runway remains?
